config.physical_robot.name: Physical Robot
config.physical_robot.tooltip: If enabled, the robot will physically drive around your farm. If disabled, it mows the grass invisibly in its radius to save performance.
config.remove_grass.name: Remove Grass Completely
config.remove_grass.tooltip: If enabled, grass is completely removed when mowed. If disabled, thick grass is only thinned out (leaves grass behind but yields more hay over time).
item.normal.name: Lawn Robot
item.normal.desc: Automatically mows grass within a small radius and stores it in the silo.
item.gold.name: Gold Lawn Robot
item.gold.desc: Automatically mows grass within a medium radius and stores it in the silo.
item.iridium.name: Iridium Lawn Robot
item.iridium.desc: Automatically mows grass within a large radius and stores it in the silo.
mail.misu1.text: Hello Farmer,^I noticed you finally built a silo! A farm isn't truly modern without some automation. I've designed a little helper that will keep the tall grass in check. Place its station anywhere on your farm, and it will do the rest.^Enjoy the free time!^- Misu the Garden Fox
mail.misu2.text: Hello again!^Two silos? You're getting serious about hay production! I've optimized the robot's circuits. With some Gold, it runs much more efficiently and covers a larger area. Here's the blueprint for the upgrade!^- Misu
mail.misu3.text: Incredible, Farmer!^Three silos... your farm is officially a high-tech operation now. I've completed my ultimate creation: The Iridium Mower. It harnesses the power of Iridium to keep almost the entire farm tidy. Good luck!^- Misu
